description_long: This awning features a robust, multi-layered construction with a tiled canopy, likely made of ceramic or concrete tiles, providing substantial weather protection. The structure includes a visible wooden or composite frame supporting the canopy, with insulation and underlayment layers sandwiched between the tiles and the main support. A window is integrated beneath the awning, suggesting it is designed to shield windows or entrances from rain and sun. The underside reveals additional structural bracing and a soffit, enhancing both durability and aesthetic appeal. The canopy edges are straight and clean, with no decorative trim, emphasizing a functional, modern design. The color palette is primarily neutral, with shades of gray, beige, and natural wood tones.
description: A sturdy, tiled awning with a wooden frame and integrated window, featuring a straight-edged, neutral-toned canopy. Designed for functional weather protection in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered construction, including the tiled canopy, wooden frame, and insulation layers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the underside of the canopy, soffit, and the integration with the building wall and window.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cross-section of the awning, revealing internal layers and structural supports.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full tiled canopy, window beneath, and the straight, clean edge of the awning.
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with wooden beams and bracing
